name: School Escape!
author: Poki
description: In School Escape! - Skip Game, you play as Nick, the master of pranks, as he hatches a cunning plan to escape the bone-chilling Scary Teacher and get to freedom! The only way out is being blocked by the Scary Teacher. She patrols the hallways and will take down every student she spots! It's up to you to sneak around, lay traps, prank the teacher and make it to the exit unseen. Along the way, you can unlock new outfits for Nick as well as cool pets that will follow you around. Can you help Nick execute the ultimate prank and skip school? How to play School Escape ! - Skip Games? Use the mouse or WASD/Arrow Keys to move around! Who created School Escape ! - Skip Games? School Escape ! - Skip Games was created by ZnK Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play School Escape ! - Skip Games for free? You can play School Escape ! - Skip Games for free on Poki. Can I play School Escape ! - Skip Games on mobile devices and desktop? School Escape ! - Skip Games can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
